name: Fish
description:
It’s just a random fish in the ocean, I dunno maybe he’s super powered, or intelligent, who knows until you tried it eh?

What I was bored AF in Aus I made this at 4:27 am I was doing an all nighter all right!?

There’s your Broly, no Kakarot’s please!

Have a nice swim! (: 🏊
creator: GodlyDivine
